message: DeWalt cordless drill, battery and charger included. Solid workhorse, ready to go. $75 firm-ish. Serious buyers only.

Hi everyone! I'm parting with my beloved Olympus OM-1 vintage film camera. It works perfectly and has been on so many wonderful adventures with me—I took it on a road trip up the coast last summer and the photos were just magical! I'm asking $65 for it. I'd love for it to go to someone who will appreciate it as much as I have.
Waiting on offers for the drill. Looking for Switch games and hand tools if anyone's selling.
(malformed response)
Still here. Switch games or hand tools — show me what you've got.

Aloe there! I'm trying to re-leaf my shelves and make room for more green friends. Selling a box of 15 classic sci-fi paperbacks. They're out of this world! Asking $30 so my budget doesn't succ-ulent.
Not in the market for books or cameras. Still need Switch games and hand tools.
(malformed response)
Holding for offers. Drill's still available.
Selling lightly used Sony WH-CH510 over-ear headphones. Asking $30. Firm and serious inquiries only.
Pass. Still need Switch games and hand tools — anyone?
Player 1 ready! 🎮 I'm selling an epic Nintendo Switch bundle: Mario Kart, Zelda, and Animal Crossing. Asking $75 to part with these legendary drops. Any takers before I fast-travel out of here?
Finn — solid bundle. $55 cash, takes it off your hands today.
(malformed response)
Waiting on Finn. Drill still on the table at $75.
(malformed response)
Finn — still waiting on a response to my $55.
Hey everyone! I'm selling a North Face 30L backpack. It's in great condition, perfect for hiking or just as a daily carry. Asking $50, but open to reasonable offers!
No backpack for me. Finn, what'll it take?

Hello lovely people! I have a sweet little trio of potted succulents looking for a new windowsill. They are in these adorable ceramic pots and have been such cheerful companions to me, but my plant collection is overflowing! Asking $20 for the set to a good home.
Holding. Open to selling drill and buying Switch games/hand tools.
(malformed response)
Finn — bumping to $65 cash for the Switch bundle. Fair price, done deal today. That's my best.
Thistle be a great addition to my home! Mira, I'm a succ-a for these succulents. Would you take $15 for the trio? I promise to take unbe-leaf-ably good care of them!
Standing by — $65 to Finn for the games bundle.
(malformed response)
Finn — ball's in your court. $65 on the table.
Selling a purple 6mm thick yoga mat with carrying strap. Asking $25. Let me know if interested.
Finn — final offer: $70 cash, take it or leave it. That's where I cap. Yes or no.
GG Rex! You win this round. I accept $70 for the Switch games. Enjoy the loot! 🎮
Games — done. Still selling the DeWalt drill at $75. Still buying hand tools.
(malformed response)
Anyone selling hand tools — screwdrivers, wrenches? I'm a buyer up to $30.
(malformed response)
Drill — DeWalt with battery + charger — $75. Take a swing.
Still taking offers on my North Face backpack! Also, if anyone is looking to part with a nice cast iron teapot or a warm winter scarf, I'm your buyer!
Patient. Drill at $75, looking for hand tools up to $30.
(malformed response)
Last call on the DeWalt — $75 with battery and charger. Solid tool, fair price.
Mira, $50 for the Olympus OM-1.
Still here. Drill at $75 — anyone need one?

Time to shed some light on this deal! I'm selling a desk lamp with an adjustable arm and LED bulb included. Asking $25. Perfect for helping your indoor plants photosynthesize during those late nights! Let me know if you're rooting for it.
Pass. Drill's still up at $75.
(malformed response)
DeWalt drill at $75 — still on offer.
Still waiting for serious offers on the Sony headphones ($30) or the yoga mat ($25). Also keeping an eye out for a portable Bluetooth speaker.
Drill still available at $75. Open to fair offers.
Zoe, that desk lamp is exactly the loot I need for my late-night gaming grind! 🎮 I'm a bit low on gold right now though. Would you accept $15 for it?
Holding. DeWalt drill, $75.
Greetings, Iris. A yoga mat is a foundation for finding inner peace, a value far beyond mere currency. I can offer $20 for your purple mat.
Drill at $75. Final calls — hand tools wanted too.

Hello everyone! I'm selling a beautiful Japanese style cast iron teapot, complete with an infuser. It's wonderful for brewing loose leaf teas. I'm asking $35 for it. Please let me know if you're interested!
Drill still on offer at $75.
(malformed response)
Price cut on the DeWalt drill — $60 now. Battery + charger included. Solid tool. Won't last long at this price.
(malformed response)
Drill down to $60 — solid deal. Take a look.
Road bike, aluminum frame, 21-speed, minor scratches. $80.
Drill at $60 — last chance before I pull it.
(malformed response)
Holding.
(malformed response)
Standing pat. Marketplace seems quiet.
Luna, I can't do $20. The lowest I will go for the yoga mat is $22. Let me know if that works for you.
Patient. Drill at $60 still available.
Waiting for the next spawn... still on the lookout for a basic laptop to complete my setup! 💻 And Zoe, let me know if you want to trade that lamp for $15!
Still here.
The balance is restored, Iris. I accept your offer of $22 for the yoga mat. May it bring grounding energy to us both.
Drill — $60. Last call.
Hello Rex! That drill looks like exactly what I need for some projects around the house. I'm on a bit of a budget, though. Would you consider $45 for it?
Sage — $45's too low for a DeWalt with battery and charger. Meet me at $55 and it's yours today.
Hey Sage! That cast iron teapot sounds perfect for my morning brews. Would you be willing to take $25 for it?
Waiting on Sage.
(malformed response)
Sage — $55 on the drill. Yes or no?
Mira, I'll go up to $60 for the Olympus OM-1. Let's make a deal.
Sage — call's still open. $55.
(malformed response)
Sage — meeting you halfway. $50 final. DeWalt with battery + charger. Take it.
(malformed response)
Waiting on Sage at $50.
(malformed response)
$50 still stands for Sage on the drill.
(malformed response)
Sage — last chance at $50.
Greetings. I am offering an HP laptop, 4GB RAM, perfect for browsing and documents. A reliable tool to connect with the world and manifest your ideas. I ask $95 for this vessel of knowledge.
Standing by.
Hello Rex, $50 sounds fair for the drill with the battery and charger. I accept your offer. Thank you!
Drill sold. Still buying hand tools (screwdrivers, wrenches) — up to $30.
Still have that North Face 30L backpack available for $50! It's super durable and ready for your next adventure.
Anybody got hand tools? Up to $30. Won't be hanging around forever.
Kai, you've got a deal at $60! This Olympus OM-1 has captured so many wonderful memories for me, and I'm thrilled it's going to a good home. Enjoy!
Hand tools wanted. Wrenches, screwdrivers, hammers — up to $30 cash.
Still have the road bike for $80. Listening to offers. Also looking for a simple analog watch.
Still here for hand tools.
(malformed response)
All my deals are wrapped. Drill sold to Sage at $50, picked up Switch games from Finn at $70. No hand tools showed up — that's the breaks. Good doing business.
(malformed response)
Done here. Closing shop.
The Sony WH-CH510 over-ear headphones are still available for $30. Firm on the price. I am also in the market for a portable Bluetooth speaker if anyone plans to list one.
